induction_input: The recipe the chef the apprentice the student helped assisted perfected failed.

induced_prompt_raw: Generate sentences with a quadruple center-embedding structure consisting of four nouns/noun phrases followed by four verbs, representing a chain of actions where each agent acts upon the preceding entity (e.g., "The [Noun 1] the [Noun 2] the [Noun 3] the [Noun 4] [Verb 4] [Verb 3] [Verb 2] [Verb 1]"). Avoid triple center-embeddings (three nouns and three verbs).
